_comment:
LAYER 6: CONTENT for the homepage. This is the 'meaning' layer, written fresh per client. Notice the markup is gone: this is just the words and the facts. The section templates in src/_includes/sections/ arrange it. Rich fields may contain and
and HTML entities; the templates output those with the 'safe' filter.

hero.headline:
Your second home
in Saigon.
hero.deck: Premium serviced apartments designed for people who actually live here, not just pass through. Flexible stays from 1 night to 6 months in the most walkable corner of Thao Dien.

usp.title: Built for people who stay longer.
usp.body: Hotels are designed for tourists. ipartment is designed for people who need a real home, with a proper kitchen, fast Wi-Fi, a workspace, and a neighbourhood worth living in.

items.title: Fully furnished
items.text: Smart locks, climate, lighting. Full kitchen, 500 Mbps fibre, smart TV, washer, premium bedding. Move in with a bag.

items.title: Remote-work ready
items.text: Dedicated workspace, 500 Mbps fibre, zero shared-office noise. Your apartment is your office, designed to actually work from.

items.title: 24/7 check-in
items.text: Check in any hour via a digital key sent to your phone. Stay 1 night or 6 months. Rates get better the longer you stay.

items.title: Best address
items.text: Saigon's most cosmopolitan district. International schools, riverside cafes, co-working spaces, and Metro Line 1, all walkable.

finder.title: Not sure which apartment fits?
finder.text: Take the 30-second finder and we will recommend the right one.

items.name: The Compact
items.text: Everything you need, nothing you don't. Perfect for short and mid-term stays.

items.name: The Standard
items.text: Proper seating and dining area. Best for mid-term stays and remote workers.

items.name: The Spacious
items.text: Separate living, dining, and home-office zones. The most popular choice.

items.name: The Long-Stay
items.text: Separate bedroom, full living room, family kitchen. Built for long-term living.

items.quote: Exactly what long-term business travel should feel like. A real home, not a hotel room. I'd move in permanently if I could.
items.author: Michael S., Consultant. 3-month stay

items.quote: The location in Thao Dien is unbeatable. International schools, cafes, the river, all within walking distance. Felt at home from day one.
items.author: Anna K., Expat Relocator. 6-month stay

items.quote: Our entire team relocated to HCMC. ipartment handled everything. Corporate rates, multiple units, zero hassle.
items.author: Regional HR Lead. Group booking, 12 units

items.quote: Self check-in worked flawlessly at midnight after a long flight. Workspace setup is better than most co-working spaces I've used.
items.author: David T., Product Manager. 6 weeks

corporate.title:
Relocating a team
to Saigon?
corporate.text: Corporate rates, central billing, and a dedicated account manager. We have handled relocations for teams of 2 to 20+. From a 3-month project to a permanent regional HQ.

location.title:
Xuan Thuy Street,
Thao Dien.
location.text: Quiet residential street, three minutes from Metro Line 1, fifteen minutes from District 1. The sweet spot between connected and calm.

items.title: Thao Dien named one of the world's coolest neighborhoods
items.excerpt: VnExpress International covers Time Out's pick of Thao Dien as one of the planet's coolest neighbourhoods. Eateries, river views, walkable streets.

items.title: Metro Line 1 opens, Vietnam's first underground urban metro
items.excerpt: JICA announces the official opening of the Ben Thanh to Suoi Tien metro. Thao Dien station is a 3-minute walk from ipartment.

items.title: Ho Chi Minh City Expat Guide 2026
items.excerpt: Asia Lifestyle Magazine's complete guide to HCMC's best districts, cost of living, and what to expect when you move here.

cta.title: Move in today.
cta.sub: Stays from 1 night to 6 months. No account needed, no payment until confirmed.
